interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the airports along with their cities and countries?
interactions.intention: List the airports along with their cities and countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AS CITY, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any airports located on islands? If so, list them with the island names.
interactions.intention: List the airports that are located on islands along with the island names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the airports along with their cities and countries?
interactions.intention: List the airports along with their cities and countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces are these airports located in?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces where these airports are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the population sizes of these provinces?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population sizes of the provinces where these airports are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME, MONDIAL_PROVINCE.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the cities and their rivers for places that also have other names?
interactions.intention: What are the cities with their rivers for places that also have other names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these cities are located on islands?
interactions.intention: Which cities with other names are located on islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the provinces for these cities?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces of the cities with other names that are located on islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents have countries with population data available for the year 2012?
interactions.intention: Which continents have countries with population data available for the year 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT C JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES M ON C.NAME = M.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS P ON M.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY WHERE P.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these continents?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the continents identified in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE NAME IN (SELECT DISTINCT M.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT C JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES M ON C.NAME = M.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS P ON M.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY WHERE P.YEAR = 2012)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you order these continents by their area in descending order?
interactions.intention: Order the continents identified earlier by their area in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE NAME IN (SELECT DISTINCT M.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT C JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES M ON C.NAME = M.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS P ON M.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY WHERE P.YEAR = 2012) ORDER BY AREA DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which deserts are located in countries with high GDP?
interactions.intention: Find deserts located in countries with high GDP.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MD.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MGD ON MD.NAME = MGD.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON MGD.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.GDP > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of each desert you found?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the deserts found in the previous question?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MD.NAME, MD.AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD WHERE MD.NAME IN (SELECT MD.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MGD ON MD.NAME = MGD.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON MGD.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.GDP > 100000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Sort these deserts by area in descending order.
interactions.intention: Sort the deserts found previously by area in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MD.NAME, MD.AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD WHERE MD.NAME IN (SELECT MD.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MGD ON MD.NAME = MGD.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON MGD.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.GDP > 100000) ORDER BY MD.AREA DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the rivers in Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: List all the rivers in Sachsen-Anhalt.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries and provinces are associated with these rivers?
interactions.intention: Find the countries and provinces associated with the rivers listed in the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGE.RIVER, MGE.COUNTRY, MGE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON MGE.RIVER = MGR.RIVER WHERE MGE.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Out of these, which river has the longest length?
interactions.intention: Find the river with the longest length from the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MR.NAME, MR.LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER MR JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE ON MGE.RIVER = MR.RIVER WHERE MGE.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt' ORDER BY MR.LENGTH DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the rivers that flow into lakes along with the respective lake names?
interactions.intention: Find rivers and the names of the lakes they flow into.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are located in specific countries and their provinces?
interactions.intention: Find lakes along with the countries and provinces they are located in.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lakes that are not located in null countries?
interactions.intention: Find lakes that are located in countries that are not null.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY != 'NULL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands in the database are linked to seas?
interactions.intention: Which islands are linked to seas?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGI.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MGI JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND MI ON MGI.ISLAND = MI.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN MII ON MI.NAME = MII.ISLAND WHERE MII.SEA IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of islands grouped by their corresponding provinces?
interactions.intention: What are the islands grouped by their provinces?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGI.PROVINCE, LISTAGG(MGI.ISLAND, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MGI.ISLAND) AS ISLANDS FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MGI JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND MI ON MGI.ISLAND = MI.NAME GROUP BY MGI.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces and the islands they contain, ordered alphabetically by province?
interactions.intention: List provinces and their islands, ordered alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ORDER BY PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What types of memberships exist in the mondial_ismember table?
interactions.intention: What are the types of memberships available in the mondial_ismember table?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the countries that are signatories?
interactions.intention: Which countries are signatories?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE TYPE = 'signatory'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For these countries, which organizations are they part of?
interactions.intention: What organizations are the signatory countries part of?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MI.COUNTRY, MO.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER MI JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION MO ON MI.ORGANIZATION = MO.ABBREVIATION WHERE MI.TYPE = 'signatory'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of provinces along with their alternative names?
interactions.intention: What is the population of provinces and their alternative names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME, MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which religions are prominent in the countries of those provinces?
interactions.intention: What are the prominent religions in the countries of the provinces retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME, MONDIAL_RELIGION.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION ON MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show the names of these provinces sorted alphabetically?
interactions.intention: What are the names of the provinces retrieved earlier, sorted alphabetically?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME ORDER BY MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the depth of the seas connected by Andaman Sea?
interactions.intention: What is the depth of the seas connected by Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M2.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M1 JOIN MONDIAL_SEA M2 ON M1.SEA2 = M2.NAME WHERE M1.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these seas has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Which of the seas connected to Andaman Sea has the largest area?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M2.NAME, M2.AREA FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M1 JOIN MONDIAL_SEA M2 ON M1.SEA2 = M2.NAME WHERE M1.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea' ORDER BY M2.AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the name of the shallowest sea among them?
interactions.intention: What is the name of the shallowest sea connected to Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M2.NAME FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M1 JOIN MONDIAL_SEA M2 ON M1.SEA2 = M2.NAME WHERE M1.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea' ORDER BY M2.DEPTH ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are located in the same province as cities in Russia?
interactions.intention: Which lakes are located in the same province as cities in Russia?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = 'R'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers pass through the lakes found in the previous question?
interactions.intention: Which rivers pass through the lakes located in the same province as cities in Russia?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = 'R'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of cities located near those rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of cities located near rivers that pass through lakes in the same province as cities in Russia?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = 'R'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the different names for cities listed in the database?
interactions.intention: What are the alternative names for cities?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces associated with these city names?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces where these cities are located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are connected to these provinces?
interactions.intention: What seas are linked to the provinces of these cities?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MCS.PROVINCE, MGS.SEA FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME MCS JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ML ON MCS.PROVINCE = ML.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS ON ML.SEA = MGS.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and areas of all islands?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and areas of all islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these islands has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Find the island with the largest area from the previously retrieved list.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What seas or lakes are connected to this island?
interactions.intention: Find the seas or lakes connected to the island with the largest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA, LAKE FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN WHERE ISLAND = (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share borders with Albania, and what are their names?
interactions.intention: Which countries share borders with Albania and what are their names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MC.CODE WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total border length of each country bordering Albania?
interactions.intention: What is the total border length of each country bordering Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2, SUM(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL' GROUP BY COUNTRY2

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list Albania's borders in descending order of their length?
interactions.intention: List Albania's borders in descending order of their length.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL' ORDER BY LENGTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the provinces that border the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: List all the provinces that border the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have provinces bordering the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Which countries have provinces bordering the Sea of Japan?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the details about seas that merge with the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Show details about seas that merge with the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.SEA2, S.AREA, S.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON M.SEA2 = S.NAME WHERE M.SEA1 = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the border lengths of countries and their forms of government?
interactions.intention: What are the border lengths of countries and their forms of government?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1, MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2, MONDIAL_BORDERS.LENGTH, MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total length of borders for each country?
interactions.intention: What is the total length of borders for each country?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1, SUM(MONDIAL_BORDERS.LENGTH) AS TOTAL_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the borders longer than 200 km?
interactions.intention: What are the borders longer than 200 km?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1, MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2, MONDIAL_BORDERS.LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.LENGTH >= 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which organizations are associated with each country?
interactions.intention: Find organizations associated with each country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population of all the countries listed?
interactions.intention: Find the total population of all the listed countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POPULATION) AS TOTAL_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the population of each province for those countries?
interactions.intention: Find the population of each province for the listed countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the cities along with their corresponding rivers and provinces?
interactions.intention: List cities with their corresponding rivers and provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the alternative names for these cities?
interactions.intention: What are the alternative names for the cities listed in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you arrange these cities alphabetically by their names?
interactions.intention: Arrange the cities alphabetically by their names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ORDER BY MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of cities in Baden-Württemberg and their corresponding provinces?
interactions.intention: What is the population of cities in Baden-Württemberg and their corresponding provinces?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION, MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE = 'Baden-Württemberg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the most recent population of Pforzheim?
interactions.intention: What is the most recent population of Pforzheim?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY = 'Pforzheim'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What year does this data for Pforzheim come from?
interactions.intention: What year does the most recent population data for Pforzheim come from?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.YEAR FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY = 'Pforzheim' AND MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION = (SELECT MAX(MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY = 'Pforzheim')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of deserts and their respective countries?
interactions.intention: What are the names of deserts and their respective countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME, MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these deserts has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Which desert has the largest area?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of the country where this desert is located?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the country where the desert with the largest area is located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_DESERT.AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_DESERT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population growth rate and ethnic composition for each country?
interactions.intention: What are the population growth rates and ethnic compositions for all countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_POPULATION.POPULATION_GROWTH, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which type of government do these countries have?
interactions.intention: What type of government do the countries mentioned in the previous interaction have?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what are the main religions in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the main religions in the countries mentioned in the previous interactions?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME, MONDIAL_RELIGION.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through countries and provinces that are also connected to lakes?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow through countries and provinces connected to lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT E.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE S ON E.RIVER = S.RIVER AND E.COUNTRY = S.COUNTRY AND E.PROVINCE = S.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE L ON S.RIVER = L.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the provinces these rivers flow through?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the provinces where the previously identified rivers flow.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE RIVER IN (SELECT DISTINCT E.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE S ON E.RIVER = S.RIVER AND E.COUNTRY = S.COUNTRY AND E.PROVINCE = S.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE L ON S.RIVER = L.LAKE)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the countries associated with these provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the countries associated with the provinces of the previously identified rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE RIVER IN (SELECT DISTINCT E.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE S ON E.RIVER = S.RIVER AND E.COUNTRY = S.COUNTRY AND E.PROVINCE = S.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE L ON S.RIVER = L.LAKE))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which islands are located in seas mentioned in the mondial_geo_sea table?
interactions.intention: Which islands are located in seas listed in the mondial_geo_sea table?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MI.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND MI JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN MII ON MI.NAME = MII.ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS ON MII.SEA = MGS.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the details of these seas, like their area and depth?
interactions.intention: What are the area and depth of the seas related to the previous islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MS.NAME, MS.AREA, MS.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA MS JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN MII ON MS.NAME = MII.SEA JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS ON MII.SEA = MGS.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort these seas by their depth in descending order?
interactions.intention: Sort the seas by depth in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA, DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA ORDER BY DEPTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are members of organizations based in France?
interactions.intention: Find the countries that are part of organizations located in France.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION WHERE MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.COUNTRY = 'F'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which of these countries share the same language?
interactions.intention: Find the countries from the previous result that share the same language.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT L1.COUNTRY, L2.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE L1 JOIN MONDIAL_LANGUAGE L2 ON L1.NAME = L2.NAME WHERE L1.COUNTRY IN (SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION WHERE MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.COUNTRY = 'F')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the percentage of the most spoken language in one of those countries?
interactions.intention: Find the percentage of the most spoken language in one of the countries from the previous result.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(PERCENTAGE) AS MAX_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT DISTINCT L1.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE L1 JOIN MONDIAL_LANGUAGE L2 ON L1.NAME = L2.NAME WHERE L1.COUNTRY IN (SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION WHERE MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.COUNTRY = 'F'))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me about the countries associated with mountains in your database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve all countries associated with mountains.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in India?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the mountains located in India.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE COUNTRY = 'IND'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are these mountains also part of any islands?
interactions.intention: Identify if the mountains in India are part of any islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN, MI.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN MM ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MM.NAME INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND MI ON MM.NAME = MI.MOUNTAIN WHERE MG.COUNTRY = 'IND'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the total border lengths for each country?
interactions.intention: What is the total length of borders for each country?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, SUM(LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share borders with Greece, and what are the lengths of those borders?
interactions.intention: What are the countries that share borders with Greece and the lengths of those borders?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C1.NAME AS COUNTRY1, C2.NAME AS COUNTRY2, B.LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = C1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C2 ON B.COUNTRY2 = C2.CODE WHERE C1.NAME = 'Greece'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Now, can you rank all the borders of Greece by their length in descending order?
interactions.intention: What are the borders of Greece ranked by their length in descending order?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C1.NAME AS COUNTRY1, C2.NAME AS COUNTRY2, B.LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = C1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C2 ON B.COUNTRY2 = C2.CODE WHERE C1.NAME = 'Greece' ORDER BY B.LENGTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through a lake and eventually reach a sea?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow through a lake and then reach a sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MR.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER MR JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH MRT ON MR.NAME = MRT.RIVER WHERE MR.LAKE IS NOT NULL AND MR.SEA IS NOT NULL;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the length of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the lengths of the rivers retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE LAKE IS NOT NULL AND SEA IS NOT NULL;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Sort these rivers by their length in descending order.
interactions.intention: Order the rivers retrieved previously by their length in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE LAKE IS NOT NULL AND SEA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY LENGTH DESC;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports are located on islands, and what are the names of these islands?
interactions.intention: Find airports located on islands and provide their corresponding island names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the elevation levels of these airports?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation levels of the airports located on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For these airports, which provinces are they located in?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces where the airports located on islands are situated.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the languages spoken in countries with their populations?
interactions.intention: List the languages spoken in countries along with their populations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME, MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country has the highest population in this dataset?
interactions.intention: Identify the country with the highest population in the dataset.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, MAX(POPULATION) AS MAX_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS GROUP BY COUNTRY ORDER BY MAX_POPULATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of that country in 2012?
interactions.intention: Find the population of the previously identified country in 2012.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS GROUP BY COUNTRY ORDER BY MAX(POPULATION) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AND YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many different types of memberships are there in the mondial_ismember table?
interactions.intention: Count the number of distinct membership types in the mondial_ismember table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TYPE) FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of organizations associated with each type of membership?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of organizations associated with each type of membership.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.TYPE, O.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER M JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION O ON M.ORGANIZATION = O.ABBREVIATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have memberships in religious organizations?
interactions.intention: Find the countries that have memberships in religious organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER M JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION R ON M.COUNTRY = R.COUNTRY WHERE M.TYPE = 'religious'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of cities in Moskovskaya province?
interactions.intention: What is the population of cities in Moskovskaya province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in the same provinces as these cities?
interactions.intention: Which mountains are located in the same provinces as the cities retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What islands are these cities located on?
interactions.intention: What islands are the cities retrieved in the previous interaction located on?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of each country in the dataset?
interactions.intention: What is the population of each country in the dataset?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents do these countries belong to?
interactions.intention: Which continents do the countries listed in the previous interaction belong to?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What languages are spoken in these countries?
interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in the countries listed in the previous interactions?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the percentage of Vietnamese people in countries where population growth is tracked?
interactions.intention: Find the percentage of Vietnamese people in countries where population growth is tracked.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.NAME, ME.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE ME.NAME = 'Vietnamese'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the highest percentage among all ethnic groups in the same country?
interactions.intention: Find the highest percentage among all ethnic groups in the same country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(PERCENTAGE) FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE COUNTRY = 'NCA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the name of the ethnic group with that percentage?
interactions.intention: Find the name of the ethnic group with the highest percentage in the same country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE PERCENTAGE = (SELECT MAX(PERCENTAGE) FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE COUNTRY = 'NCA')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of cities and their countries that have airports?
interactions.intention: What are the names of cities and their countries that have airports?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports in the retrieved cities?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which provinces are these airports located in?
interactions.intention: Which provinces are the airports in the retrieved cities located in?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the names of cities and their respective rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the names of cities and their respective rivers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any lakes associated with these cities?
interactions.intention: What lakes are associated with the cities retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATED.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands are these cities located on, if any?
interactions.intention: What islands are the cities retrieved earlier located on?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of all the continents?
interactions.intention: What is the total area of all the continents?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are in each continent?
interactions.intention: Which countries are in each continent?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME, MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the countries in each continent?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME, MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the percentage of ethnic groups along with the population growth of their countries?
interactions.intention: Provide the percentage of ethnic groups along with the population growth of their countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE, MONDIAL_POPULATION.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which ethnic group has the highest percentage?
interactions.intention: Identify the ethnic group with the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, MAX(PERCENTAGE) AS HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP GROUP BY NAME ORDER BY HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the primary religion in the country of that ethnic group?
interactions.intention: Find the primary religion in the country of the ethnic group identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME, MAX(MONDIAL_RELIGION.PERCENTAGE) AS HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME = '<ethnic group identified earlier>' GROUP BY MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME ORDER BY HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through provinces and countries listed in the estuary table?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow through the provinces and countries listed in the estuary table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MGR.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE ON MGR.RIVER = MGE.RIVER AND MGR.COUNTRY = MGE.COUNTRY AND MGR.PROVINCE = MGE.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the provinces listed in the estuary table?
interactions.intention: List the names of the provinces listed in the estuary table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are connected to rivers listed in the estuary table?
interactions.intention: Find lakes connected to rivers listed in the estuary table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ML.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LAKE ML JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER MR ON ML.RIVER = MR.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE ON MR.RIVER = MGE.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the islands located in the seas mentioned in the database?
interactions.intention: List the islands located in the seas mentioned in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these islands?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the islands retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND WHERE NAME IN (SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the elevation of these islands?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the islands retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND WHERE NAME IN (SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the total border length of each country?
interactions.intention: What is the total border length of each country?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, SUM(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share borders with the one that has the longest total border length?
interactions.intention: Which countries share borders with the country with the longest total border length?

ground_truths.golden_sql: WITH MAX_BORDER_COUNTRY AS (SELECT COUNTRY1 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1 ORDER BY SUM(LENGTH) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = (SELECT COUNTRY1 FROM MAX_BORDER_COUNTRY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Now, can you list their individual border lengths?
interactions.intention: What is the border length of each neighboring country?

ground_truths.golden_sql: WITH MAX_BORDER_COUNTRY AS (SELECT COUNTRY1 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1 ORDER BY SUM(LENGTH) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) SELECT COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = (SELECT COUNTRY1 FROM MAX_BORDER_COUNTRY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are connected through the mondial_mergeswith table?
interactions.intention: Which seas are connected as per the mondial_mergeswith table?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.SEA1, M.SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S1 ON M.SEA1 = S1.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S2 ON M.SEA2 = S2.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any rivers that flow into the seas mentioned?
interactions.intention: Are there any rivers that flow into the seas retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER R JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON R.SEA = S.NAME WHERE S.NAME IN (SELECT SEA1 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH UNION SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are associated with these rivers?
interactions.intention: Which mountains are associated with the rivers retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M.NAME FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN M JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER R ON M.NAME = R.MOUNTAINS WHERE R.NAME IN (SELECT R.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER R JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON R.SEA = S.NAME WHERE S.NAME IN (SELECT SEA1 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH UNION SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of all mountains listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve all mountain names from the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me which provinces these mountains are located in?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces for the mountains retrieved earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries do these mountains belong to, and provide their governance type?
interactions.intention: Find the countries and their governance types for the mountains already retrieved.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN, MG.COUNTRY, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MG.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share a sea region and also have GDP data available?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a sea region and also have GDP data available?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Among those countries, which one has the highest GDP?
interactions.intention: Which country from the previous list has the highest GDP?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE GDP = (SELECT MAX(GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the unemployment rate in that country?
interactions.intention: What is the unemployment rate of the country with the highest GDP?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE GDP = (SELECT MAX(GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the types of government of the countries that border Albania?
interactions.intention: What are the types of government of the countries that border Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY2, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP.COUNTRY WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total length of Albania's borders?
interactions.intention: What is the total length of Albania's borders?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MB.LENGTH) AS TOTAL_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And in which continents are these neighboring countries?
interactions.intention: In which continents are the neighboring countries of Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY2, ME.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MB.COUNTRY2 = ME.COUNTRY WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all rivers that have an estuary and are also present in the river data?
interactions.intention: List rivers that appear in both the estuary and river data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER AND MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which sources correspond to these rivers?
interactions.intention: Find the sources for the rivers identified in the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER AND MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you group the rivers based on their countries and provinces?
interactions.intention: Group the rivers by their country and province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, PROVINCE, COUNT(DISTINCT RIVER) AS RIVER_COUNT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY GROUP BY COUNTRY, PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you give me the names of deserts along with their provinces and countries?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of deserts along with their provinces and countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME, MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those deserts, can you also provide the population of their provinces?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population of provinces where the deserts are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME, MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which desert has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Find the desert with the largest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow into the lakes listed in your database?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers that flow into the lakes in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVER.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of each lake?
interactions.intention: Get the area of each lake in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which rivers pass through these lakes?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers that pass through the lakes retrieved earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country has the highest GDP, and what are the corresponding rivers flowing through it?
interactions.intention: Find the country with the highest GDP and list the rivers flowing through it.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP, MGR.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON ME.COUNTRY = MGR.COUNTRY WHERE ME.GDP = (SELECT MAX(GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the unemployment rate in that country?
interactions.intention: Find the unemployment rate in the country with the highest GDP.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE GDP = (SELECT MAX(GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the inflation rate there?
interactions.intention: Find the inflation rate in the country with the highest GDP.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT INFLATION FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE GDP = (SELECT MAX(GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces where mountains are located?
interactions.intention: List the provinces where mountains are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the names of the mountains in one of these provinces, for example, Kerala?
interactions.intention: List the mountains located in the province Kerala.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE PROVINCE = 'Kerala'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the country that this province belongs to?
interactions.intention: Find the country to which the province Kerala belongs.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN INNER JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = 'Kerala'
